name: UmweltBank AG
summary: UmweltBank AG provides various banking products and services in Germany. The company offers various deposit products; savings accounts and bonds, current accounts, and environmental accounts; and loan and financing products. It also provides guaranteed bonus and contracts; income plans, investment products, medium-term savings facilities, and insurance and pension products, as well as online and phone banking services. The company primarily offers its products for photovoltaic, wind and hydropower, biomass, combined heat and power plants, and organic farming fields. UmweltBank AG was founded in 1997 and is based in Nuremberg, Germany.
